evidenceCommands: rg -n 'Generate Affected Surfaces table|Affected surface coverage|FIX ADDENDUM: AFFECTED SURFACES|affected-surfaces' .opencode
summary: End-to-end simulation confirms the R4/R7 metadata can be emitted but is not explicitly consumed by /spec_kit:plan; the affected-surfaces template/checklist rows exist, but the Planning Packet handoff remains report-only.
